  Reminder: language intelligence — new diagnostics, completions, hover content, navigation — lives
  in the otui-lsp server, not here. Request those at https://github.com/zoelner/otui-lsp/issues.

  This template is for client-side improvements: settings, commands, activation, packaging,
  coloring/theme mapping, editor integration.
-->
